PROP-baseauction-inv-043.text: All dataStreamsFeedIds must be allowlisted before bulk verification to prevent processing rogue feeds.
PROP-baseauction-inv-043.assertion: forall transmit: feedIdToAsset[feedId]==0 => revert FeedNotAllowlisted before verifyBulk

locations.note: feedIdToAsset allowlist check must occur before verifierProxy.verifyBulk call
